'''鈭歞-k-ch''' ('''dakacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:etiologize|etiologize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:etiologize|etiologize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| dakacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dakachithi|dakachithi]] || [[word:dakachiji|dakachiji]] || [[word:dakachishi|dakachishi]] || [[word:dakachi|dakachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakachuthuth|dakachuthuth]] || [[word:dakachujuj|dakachujuj]] || [[word:dakachushush|dakachushush]] || [[word:dakach|dakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakachuthu|dakachuthu]] || [[word:dakachuju|dakachuju]] || [[word:dakachushu|dakachushu]] || [[word:dakachu|dakachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakachufuth|dakachufuth]] || [[word:dakachufuj|dakachufuj]] || [[word:dakachufush|dakachufush]] || [[word:dakachuf|dakachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dakachethe|dakachethe]] || [[word:dakacheje|dakacheje]] || [[word:dakacheshe|dakacheshe]] || [[word:dakache|dakache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakachothoth|dakachothoth]] || [[word:dakachojoj|dakachojoj]] || [[word:dakachoshosh|dakachoshosh]] || [[word:dakach|dakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakachotho|dakachotho]] || [[word:dakachojo|dakachojo]] || [[word:dakachosho|dakachosho]] || [[word:dakacho|dakacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakachofoth|dakachofoth]] || [[word:dakachofoj|dakachofoj]] || [[word:dakachofosh|dakachofosh]] || [[word:dakachof|dakachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dakach忙th忙|dakach忙th忙]] || [[word:dakach忙j忙|dakach忙j忙]] || [[word:dakach忙sh忙|dakach忙sh忙]] || [[word:dakach忙|dakach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakachathath|dakachathath]] || [[word:dakachajaj|dakachajaj]] || [[word:dakachashash|dakachashash]] || [[word:dakach|dakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakachatha|dakachatha]] || [[word:dakachaja|dakachaja]] || [[word:dakachasha|dakachasha]] || [[word:dakacha|dakacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakachafath|dakachafath]] || [[word:dakachafaj|dakachafaj]] || [[word:dakachafash|dakachafash]] || [[word:dakachaf|dakachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dakachasha|dakachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godakachasha|godakachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidakachasha|gokidakachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dakachn眉sha|dakachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godakachnkn眉sha|godakachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidakachn眉sha|gokidakachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dakachsh毛sha|dakachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godakachnksh毛sha|godakachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidakachsh毛sha|gokidakachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dakachrosha|dakachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godakachnkrosha|godakachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidakachrosha|gokidakachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dakachmusha|dakachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godakachnkmusha|godakachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakachmusha|gokidakachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dakachsherasha|dakachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godakachnksherasha|godakachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidakachsherasha|gokidakachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dakachngasha|dakachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godakachnkngasha|godakachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidakachngasha|gokidakachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dakachyasha|dakachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godakachnkyasha|godakachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidakachyasha|gokidakachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dakachyamasha|dakachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godakachnkyamasha|godakachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidakachyamasha|gokidakachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dakachn眉sh毛sha|dakachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godakachnkn眉sh毛sha|godakachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidakachn眉sh毛sha|gokidakachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dakachn眉rosha|dakachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godakachnkn眉rosha|godakachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidakachn眉rosha|gokidakachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakachn眉musha|dakachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godakachnkn眉musha|godakachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakachn眉musha|gokidakachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dakachsh毛n眉sha|dakachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godakachnksh毛n眉sha|godakachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidakachsh毛n眉sha|gokidakachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dakachsh毛rosha|dakachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godakachnksh毛rosha|godakachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidakachsh毛rosha|gokidakachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakachsh毛musha|dakachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godakachnksh毛musha|godakachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakachsh毛musha|gokidakachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dakachron眉sha|dakachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godakachnkron眉sha|godakachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidakachron眉sha|gokidakachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dakachrosh毛sha|dakachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godakachnkrosh毛sha|godakachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidakachrosh毛sha|gokidakachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakachromusha|dakachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godakachnkromusha|godakachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakachromusha|gokidakachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dakachmun眉sha|dakachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godakachnkmun眉sha|godakachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidakachmun眉sha|gokidakachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dakachmush毛sha|dakachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godakachnkmush毛sha|godakachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidakachmush毛sha|gokidakachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dakachmurosha|dakachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godakachnkmurosha|godakachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidakachmurosha|gokidakachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dakach|dakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙k忙ch|d忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodakach|hodakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙k忙ch|hod忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodakach|hohodakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙k忙ch|hohod忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dakach|n眉dakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙k忙ch|n眉d忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dakach|n眉n眉dakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙k忙ch|n眉n眉d忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dakach|n茂dakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙k忙ch|n茂d忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dakach|n茂n茂dakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙k忙ch|n茂n茂d忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludakach|ludakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙k忙ch|lud忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludakach|luludakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙k忙ch|lulud忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidakach|lidakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙k忙ch|lid忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidakach|lilidakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙k忙ch|lilid忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodakach|kodakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙k忙ch|kod忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodakach|kokodakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙k忙ch|kokod忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedakach|kedakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙k忙ch|ked忙k忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedakach|kekedakach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙k忙ch|keked忙k忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
